_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: We generated an average of 2.5 M demultiplexed reads per sample, which provided 186,903 total SNPs, with 92,510 meeting our filtering criteria.
details: Generated average of 2.5 M demultiplexed reads per sample, providing 186,903 total SNPs with 92,510 meeting filtering criteria from 170 individual animals
